title: Yutusk
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Yutusk.jpg]] |name=Yutusk |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]] |system=[[Yutusk system/Legends|Yutusk system]] |coordinates=R-5 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Temperate]] |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym=Yutuski |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]]{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}} *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|Are any mission officers still in service?''"
"''Two are on active duty at Yutusk… Commander Bly and Lt. Galle.|Darth Vader and Erv Lekauf|''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]''}} '''Yutusk''' was a temperate backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Yutusk system/Legends|Yutusk system]] subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was the homeworld of [[Chef/Legends|chef]] [[Vimran Trell]], whom was conscripted in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. His parents [[Tranira Trell]] and [[Francill Trell]] were killed when Imperial forces rounded up and executed suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizers on Yutusk. It had been a major planet in [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot's]] [[Xim's empire|empire]], having served as the Sixth Throne. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Yutusk}} *''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Yutusk |es=Yutusk }} [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Mortex sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Xim Thrones]]
